nasb.text: But the eleven disciples proceeded to Galilee, to the mountain which Jesus had designated.

esv.text: Now the eleven disciples went to Galilee, to the mountain to which Jesus had directed them.

cnv.text: 十一個門徒往加利利去，到了耶穌指定的山上。

ccb.text: 十一个门徒赶到加利利，到了耶稣和他们约定的山上，

csbs.text: 十一个门徒往加利利去，到了耶稣给他们指定的那座山上。
